visual_description:
A close-up shot focuses on a silver Motorola flip phone. The phone's small screen is illuminated, displaying a text message in Chinese characters. The message reads, "新来电话：" followed by a phone number, "445544887700". A notification icon with a bell and the number "111" is visible on the right side of the screen. The background is dark and out of focus. In the top left corner of the frame, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are superimposed. The audio begins with a sharp, electronic ringing sound, like a digital notification on a phone.

The camera cuts to a medium shot of an older man standing in a dimly lit room. He has graying hair and is wearing a light-colored suit jacket over a light blue collared shirt. He looks down at the phone in his hands with a slight, knowing smile. The background is a dark, tiled wall, and other people are seated in the dimly lit, out-of-focus background. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. Immediately following the ring, a rhythmic and suspenseful electronic beat kicks in. The music has a modern, slightly tense, and investigative feel,
